channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Global geopolitical news headlines curated by AI

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukrainian drone hits luxury Moscow tower days before Victory Day parade
item.description: A drone attack struck the Mosfilm Tower in central Moscow, marking one of the deepest strikes into the Russian capital residential core. The attack comes just days before the May 9 Victory Day parade.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israel extends detention of Gaza flotilla activists amid torture allegations
item.description: An Israeli court extended by two days the detention of two foreign activists from a Gaza-bound flotilla intercepted in international waters. The activists allege severe physical abuse during their seizure.

item.title: 🚢 Three dead from suspected hantavirus outbreak on Atlantic cruise ship
item.description: A suspected hantavirus outbreak aboard the MV Hondius cruise ship has killed three passengers, with one more in intensive care. The ship was traveling from Argentina to the Canary Islands via Antarctica.

item.title: 🇩🇪 Merz affirms US as Germany key partner despite troop cuts and Iran tensions
item.description: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz stated the US remains Germany most important NATO partner, playing down tensions over Iran policy and confirming the US will not station Tomahawk missiles in Germany.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine Strikes Russian Baltic Oil Port of Primorsk in Major Drone Assault
item.description: Ukraine launched a wave of drone strikes on Primorsk, Russia Baltic oil export hub, disrupting operations at the key terminal handling Urals crude shipments.

item.title: 🇺🇦 IAEA Reports Drone Strike on Zaporizhzhia Nuclear Plant Radiation Lab
item.description: The International Atomic Energy Agency reported a drone strike on a radiation monitoring facility at the Zaporizhzhia nuclear power plant, underscoring continued risks to the site.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Jailed Iranian Nobel Laureate Narges Mohammadi in Critical Condition
item.description: Nobel Peace Prize winner Narges Mohammadi remains in critical condition in an Iranian prison, raising international concerns about her health and treatment.

item.title: 🛢️ UAE Exits Arab Oil Exporters Group OAPEC
item.description: The United Arab Emirates has withdrawn from the Organization of Arab Petroleum Exporting Countries amid shifting energy alliances in the Middle East.

item.title: 💴 Japanese Yen Steadies as Intervention Fears Linger
item.description: The Japanese yen held steady as markets watched for signs of government intervention amid heightened volatility from global tensions.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Warns US Hormuz Operation Would Violate Ceasefire
item.description: Iran has warned that any US military operation to escort ships through the Strait of Hormuz would constitute a violation of the fragile ceasefire agreement.

item.title: 🛢️ OPEC+ Agrees Third Output Quota Hike Since Hormuz Closure
item.description: OPEC+ has agreed to a third oil output quota increase to compensate for supply disruptions caused by the Strait of Hormuz closure.

item.title: 📉 Oil Prices Ease After Trump Hormuz Escort Announcement
item.description: Oil prices retreated after President Trump announced US plans to help free ships stranded in the Strait of Hormuz, easing supply concerns.

item.title: ⚔️ Israel Approves Purchase of New F-35 and F-15IA Fighter Squadrons
item.description: Israel approved a major defense procurement to acquire additional F-35 stealth fighters and F-15IA aircraft from the United States.

item.title: 🇴🇲 Iranian drones strike Oman oil storage facility at Salalah port
item.description: Iranian drone strikes hit Oman largest oil storage facility at Salalah port, expanding the conflict reach into neutral Gulf states.

item.title: 🛢️ Oil surges past $120/barrel as Trump rejects Iran overture
item.description: Oil prices surged past $120 per barrel to a war-time high after President Trump rejected an Iranian diplomatic proposal and announced plans for a Hormuz escort operation.

item.title: 🏛️ Pentagon's Office of Net Assessment chief joins Anthropic
item.description: The former head of the Pentagon's in-house think tank, the Office of Net Assessment, has joined AI company Anthropic.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China stages naval drill east of Philippines amid US-Balikatan exercises
item.description: China conducted naval exercises east of the Philippines while US and Filipino forces held their annual Balikatan joint military drills.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump Announces "Project Freedom" to Free Ships from Strait of Hormuz
item.description: President Trump announced Project Freedom, a US military operation to escort commercial ships trapped in the Strait of Hormuz since the Iran-Israel conflict began.

item.title: 📉 Fed Kashkari: Iran War Limits Rate Guidance
item.description: Minneapolis Fed President Neel Kashkari said the ongoing Iran war creates inflation risks that limit the Federal Reserve ability to provide rate guidance.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Seeks Advantage Between Trump and Iran as War Evolves
item.description: Beijing is positioning itself to capitalize on the widening rift between Washington and Tehran while navigating its own relationships with both nations.

item.title: ⛪ Secretary of State Rubio to Meet Pope Leo This Week
item.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio will travel to the Vatican this week for meetings with Pope Leo and Italian leaders amid Middle East tensions.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK to Join EU 105 Billion Dollar Ukraine Loan
item.description: The United Kingdom is set to enter talks to join the European Union 105.9 billion loan package for Ukraine following the post-Brexit reset in relations.

item.title: ⚔️ Two US Troops Missing During African Lion Military Exercise in Morocco
item.description: Two US service members are missing during the African Lion military exercise in Morocco, US Africa Command reported.

item.title: 🛢️ Trump Administration Halts US Wind Farm Projects Citing National Security
item.description: The Trump administration has halted US wind farm projects citing national security concerns, reversing previous energy policy.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israel Court Extends Detention of Gaza Flotilla Activists
item.description: An Israeli court extended the detention of activists from a Gaza-bound flotilla intercepted by Israeli forces in international waters.
